#payement method usage in percentage

fd1=df.groupby('Payment Method')[['Transaction ID']].count()
t=((fd1/fd1.sum())*100).round(2)
t

In [163]:
# pyement method repartition in bar chart
ax=t.plot.barh(title= 'payement method repartition',xlabel='Value in percentage')
for container in ax.containers:
    ax.bar_label(container)

In [67]:
df['Month']=pd.to_datetime(df['Month'], format='%m').dt.month_name()
In [90]:
#quantity_order=df.groupby('Month')[['Quantity']].sum()

month_order = [
    'January','February','March','April','May','June',
    'July','August','September','October','November','December'
]
df['Month']=pd.Categorical(df['Month'],categories=month_order,ordered=True)
df=df.sort_values('Month')
In [107]:
quantity_order=df.groupby('Month')[['Quantity']].sum()
quantity_order

In [165]:
# month sales trend

t5=quantity_order.plot.line(title='Monthly quantity sold trend',ylabel='Quantity Ordered',figsize=(20,7), marker='o')
plt.xticks(rotation=45) 
for container in t5.containers:
    t5.line_label(container)

plt.show()
In [169]:
# Quantity ordered per month
y1=quantity_order.plot.barh(title='Quantity ordered per month')
for container in y1.containers:
    y1.bar_label(container)
